headline: Is Paycom (PAYC) Turning Asset Management Automation Into a New Edge in HCM Software?
summary: Earlier this month, Paycom Software launched Asset Management, a unified HCM-embedded tool that automates tracking, allocation and recovery of workplaces, seating and company assets across the employee life cycle. By folding workspace mapping, property ownership and payroll-linked cost recoupment into one system, Paycom is extending its automation focus beyond HR workflows into physical asset control and compliance. Next, we’ll examine how this expansion into automated asset and workspace...
